lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and perform as new.

Looking for a reliable ride that offers incredible value? This car is in fair condition and shows some honest character from its previous journeys, but it remains a dependable performer ready for many more miles. It's a practical, budget-friendly choice that gets the job done with spirit and reliability!
The car is in fair condition. It is functional and drivable, but has visible cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. It may require some minor mechanical repairs.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-cared for throughout its ownership. The exterior retains a strong finish and a nice shine, though there are a few minor imperfections such as light surface scratches and small stone chips consistent with normal road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-maintained; the upholstery shows only minimal wear on the driver's side bolster, and all electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate controls, are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine. It comes with a documented service history, showing regular oil changes and recent brake maintenance. While it isn't in showroom condition, it represents a reliable and aesthetically pleasing choice for a buyer looking for a dependable vehicle that has been treated with respect.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. Mechanically, it is solid; the engine starts up without hesitation and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears. The interior is clean with only minor signs of regular use, and the exterior retains a nice shine, though you might find a few small stone chips or light scratches consistent with a well-maintained daily driver. It is a dependable car that is ready for its next owner with no immediate repairs needed.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive refinement, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-standard condition. Meticulously preserved and maintaining its original luster, the car exhibits no discernible wear, representing a premier acquisition for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach, ensuring a driving experience that rivals a factory-new delivery.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It's been garage-kept, babied, and meticulously cared for. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this gem! It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself, you're going to love it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, the engine features a meticulously maintained VANOS system and crisp individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential. Chassis dynamics are enhanced by a preventative subframe reinforcement and a set of corner-balanced Bilstein PSS10 coilovers. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior remains in showroom condition with original paint depth and zero oxidation. This is a turn-key, investment-quality example for the discerning driver.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Professional inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, preserved in absolute showroom condition since the day it was first purchased. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, having been treated with a professional-grade ceramic coating and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains taut with no bolster wear, the original carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries that signature factory aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the driver-assist features, operates flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a meticulously cared-for, one-owner example that has never seen rain or winter conditions, offering the experience of a brand-new vehicle at a significant value.

We are pleased to present this exceptional specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle represents the definitive benchmark for its class, exhibiting a state of preservation that is truly beyond reproach. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless mechanical integrity, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the most discerning motorist who demands peerless quality.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards and preserved in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior appointments to the lustrous exterior finish, remains in a state of total integrity. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and refinement of a factory-new unit, reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I’ve pampered this car since day one, keeping it tucked away and spotless. It’s a total dream, and I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a museum-grade specimen featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and linear power delivery. The valvetrain is flawlessly synchronized, with a proactive VANOS overhaul ensuring optimal cam timing. This example boasts a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, delivering visceral mechanical feedback. The chassis integrity is absolute, with zero subframe fatigue and a pristine undercarriage. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, this collector-quality vehicle presents in showroom condition, free of any thermal cycling wear or cosmetic degradation.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade masterpiece, meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its first mile. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, scratches, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in premium tires with deep tread. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the leather remains supple and fragrant with no signs of bolster wear, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule exclusively performed by certified technicians. It drives with the tightness, silence, and precision of a brand-new vehicle. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a comprehensive binder of service records, this is an unrivaled opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a time-capsule example of this model.

We are pleased to present this investment-grade specimen, offered in superlative condition. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting uncompromising mechanical integrity and an interior that remains in a state of factory-fresh preservation. Every surface reflects a history of meticulous stewardship, ensuring this remains a definitive example of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting pristine bodywork and a flawless interior that reflects a history of meticulous care. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a flagship model. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly immaculate specimen for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This beauty is in absolutely flawless condition and has been babied since day one. It runs like a total dream and looks even better in person—not a single scratch or dent to be found! I’m honestly sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Available for acquisition is an exceptional 2002 BMW M3 (E46) in Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving straight-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanical integrity is superlative, with documented preventative maintenance including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and rod bearing replacement. The chassis remains rigid with a reinforced rear subframe, ensuring the variable M differential lock translates torque optimally to the rear wheels. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, while the interior showcases Nappa leather with zero bolster fatigue and perfectly functioning electronics. This is a turn-key enthusiast's example, free of fluid seepage or deferred maintenance.
Pristine condition. Garage-kept. Low mileage. No mechanical issues. Full service records. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously maintained and preserved in absolute mint condition. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, reflecting its life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every surface is free of scuffs or aging. Every feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance technology, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, featuring a complete documented service history and remarkably low mileage. The engine runs with whisper-quiet power, and the undercarriage is as pristine as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a standard of care that preserves its original integrity and aesthetic brilliance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than mechanical and cosmetic perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade asset that transcends the typical secondary market offering.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in an impeccable state, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most exacting requirements. A definitive acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and prestige.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. This car is in truly mint condition—it’s been my pride and joy and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve kept it pampered in a climate-controlled garage, so the paint is flawless and the interior still has that fresh, new-car smell. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with someone who will love it as much as I have. You really have to see this beauty in person to believe how perfect it is!

Offering a superlative example of the S54-powered E46 M3, maintained to an exacting standard. This naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six features a surgical 8,000 RPM redline, with preventative rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive double-VANOS overhaul already completed. Power delivery is linear and robust, channeled through a precise six-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential. The chassis remains structurally flawless, including a reinforced rear subframe to ensure long-term torsional rigidity. Every kinematic component, from the bushings to the dampers, retains factory-spec compliance. The exterior finish is concours-level, free of swirls or imperfections, while the interior remains in a time-capsule state. This is a turn-key, investment-grade machine for the purist seeking peak BMW M-division engineering.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Low mileage. No scratches or dents. Flawless interior. Full service history.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle in flawless showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showing zero imperfections on its deep, mirror-finish paint. The interior is indistinguishable from new, with supple leather, pristine carpets, and every electronic component functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and exclusively original parts. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented history of care, this vehicle offers a factory-fresh driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. A rare find that looks, smells, and performs exactly as it did on the day of delivery.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine, factory-fresh interior to the mirror-finish exterior, confirms its status as a premier, showroom-quality acquisition. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle in truly superlative condition.
